primitives.title: Task Workspace Memory
primitives.summary: Persist task-specific workspace snapshots so later papers inherit task desk state.

primitives.title: Ambient Autosave
primitives.summary: Debounced current-task workspace capture with manual-mode skip, follows windows, blocklists, task-window claim filtering, tagged-window inference, process-tree claim inference, process-root claim expansion, and foreign claimed-window cleanup.

primitives.title: Task Window Claims
primitives.summary: Declare or infer that windows belong to tasks by window identity or process root so foreign windows, including guarded app/title-filtered reused windows, do not pollute active paper snapshots and can be redirected home.

primitives.title: Follows Windows
primitives.summary: Detect windows seen across several workspaces and move them with focused task workspace unless excluded; redirect claimed foreign-task windows back home.

primitives.summary: Route external events into prioritized human-review papers with actions, leases, lineage, and idempotency.

primitives.summary: Store context resources and manage local restore requests for browser tabs, files, and deeplinks.

primitives.summary: Poll Slack/GitHub/local/MCP/voice/agent-run sources into event routing and task sessions.

primitives.summary: Resolve foreground Codex windows, inspect Codex/Claude session logs, and auto-bind task sessions from visible agent windows.
